ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date of termination (if applicable) */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for termination (if applicable) */,
  "dept" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary level of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept FOREIGN KEY ("dept") REFERENCES departments ("dept_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the performance record belongs to */,
  "satisfaction_level" REAL /* Satisfaction level of the employee */,
  "last_evaluation" REAL /* Last performance evaluation score of the employee */,
  "number_project" INTEGER /* Number of projects the employee has worked on */,
  "average_montly_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly hours the employee has worked */,
  "time_spend_company" INTEGER /* Time the employee has spent at the company */,
  "work_accident" INTEGER /* Number of work accidents the employee has been involved in */,
  "promotion_last_5years" INTEGER /* Number of promotions the employee has received in the last 5 years */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance evaluation */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the manager */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Manager's feedback on the performance */,
  "self_assessment" TEXT /* Employee's self-assessment */,
  "goals_achieved" INTEGER /* Number of goals achieved */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Total training hours completed */,
  "sick_leaves" INTEGER /* Number of sick leaves taken */,
  "vacation_leaves" INTEGER /* Number of vacation leaves taken */,
  "projects_completed" INTEGER /* Number of projects completed */,
  "projects_delayed" INTEGER /* Number of projects delayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head FOREIGN KEY ("department_head") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the access record belongs to */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the access record belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the employee (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted access */,
  "access_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "access_valid_until" TEXT /* Date when access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_access_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("access_granted_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
